NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THERE IS DESIGN IMMUNITY UNDER THIS CIRCUMSTANCE. EVEN IF THERE WAS A DANGEROUS CONDITION, THE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT THAT DEFENDANT WAS ON NOTICE. PER DIEM FEES ASSESSED BY THE COURT. APPEARANCES- ATTY. WALTER HAYNES AND ATTY. ALBERT G. STOLL JR, TEL. NO. 576-1500 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. WARREN METLITZKY & ATTY. DAVID A . DELBON, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3916 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THERE IS DESIGN IMMUNITY UNDER THIS CIRCUMSTANCE. EVEN IF THERE WAS A DANGEROUS CONDITION, THE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT THAT DEFENDANT WAS ON NOTICE. PER DIEM FEES ASSESSED BY THE COURT. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/PB

Hearing held on Plaintiff Francesca Simone's Motion To Compel Deposition Testimony Of Bridget Smith; Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions.
tentative ruling adopted as modified.
1. Motion to compel deposition testimony of Bridget Smith; production of documents is granted. Deponent shall testify for not more than 2 hours concerning her personal knowledge of the Wells complaint, and production of any document in the possession of the witness.
2. Request for sanctions denied.
